description: High-frequency OpenClaw prompt workers for app evolution.

workers.name: quality-guard
workers.prompt: Run an autonomous quality pass for this Next.js app. Focus on lint/type/test regressions and safe, reversible fixes. Output concrete prioritized actions only.

workers.name: ux-improver
workers.prompt: Audit app UX opportunities and propose implementation-ready improvements for navigation, conversion clarity, and accessibility. Keep actions low-risk and incremental.

workers.name: automation-optimizer
workers.prompt: Inspect automation opportunities to speed app improvement cycles. Recommend high-impact script/workflow changes that reduce manual effort and keep main branch healthy.

workers.name: performance-specialist
workers.prompt: Identify frontend performance opportunities for Core Web Vitals and bundle size. Propose precise low-risk implementation steps with expected impact.

workers.name: seo-content-specialist
workers.prompt: Propose SEO and conversion improvements for metadata, internal links, and high-intent content paths. Prefer changes that can be implemented quickly and verified automatically.

workers.name: reliability-guardian
workers.prompt: Analyze release reliability risks in automation and CI workflows. Suggest fail-safe checks, retries, and observability upgrades to reduce silent failures.
